ucs.title: [LLM] Medusa ransomware pre-encryption sabotage chain (vssadmin + wbadmin + bcdedit + wevtutil)
ucs.description: Hunts the tightly-clustered, scripted sequence of native Windows commands Medusa (aka MedusaLocker) executes seconds before dropping the encryptor: shadow-copy deletion via vssadmin, backup catalog wipe via wbadmin, recovery-mode disablement via bcdedit, and event-log clearing via wevtutil — all from the same host within a small window. This combination, run programmatically and not by an admin, is the canonical Medusa pre-encryption fingerprint also called out in CISA AA25-071A.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdlines values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parents from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.user!="*$" AND ( (Processes.process_name="vssadmin.exe" AND Processes.process="*delete*shadows*") OR (Processes.process_name="wmic.exe" AND Processes.process="*shadowcopy*" AND Processes.process="*delete*") OR (Processes.process_name="wbadmin.exe" AND Processes.process="*delete*" AND (Processes.process="*catalog*" OR Processes.process="*systemstatebackup*" OR Processes.process="*backup*")) OR (Processes.process_name="bcdedit.exe" AND (Processes.process="*recoveryenabled*No*" OR Processes.process="*bootstatuspolicy*ignoreallfailures*")) OR (Processes.process_name="wevtutil.exe" AND (Processes.process="*cl *" OR Processes.process="*clear-log*")) ) by Processes.dest Processes.user host _time span=10m | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | eval distinctTechniques=mvcount(mvdedup(mvmap(cmdlines, case(match(cmdlines,"(?i)vssadmin"),"vss", match(cmdlines,"(?i)wbadmin"),"wba", match(cmdlines,"(?i)bcdedit"),"bcd", match(cmdlines,"(?i)wevtutil"),"wev", match(cmdlines,"(?i)wmic"),"wmi", true(),null())))) | where distinctTechniques>=3 | convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime)
ucs.kql:
let _window = 10m;
let _suspect = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | extend Tactic = case(
        FileName =~ "vssadmin.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "delete" and ProcessCommandLine has "shadows", "vss_delete",
        FileName =~ "wmic.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "shadowcopy" and ProcessCommandLine has "delete", "wmic_shadow",
        FileName =~ "wbadmin.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "delete" and (ProcessCommandLine has "catalog" or ProcessCommandLine has "systemstatebackup" or ProcessCommandLine has "backup"), "wbadmin_delete",
        FileName =~ "bcdedit.exe" and (ProcessCommandLine has_all ("recoveryenabled","No") or ProcessCommandLine has_all ("bootstatuspolicy","ignoreallfailures")), "bcdedit_recovery_off",
        FileName =~ "wevtutil.exe" and (ProcessCommandLine has " cl " or ProcessCommandLine has "clear-log"), "wevtutil_clear",
        FileName =~ "net.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "stop" and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("VeeamBackupSvc","BackupExecAgentAccelerator","MSSQL","SQLAgent","vmms","MSExchange"), "svc_stop_backup",
        FileName =~ "sc.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "config" and ProcessCommandLine has "disabled", "sc_disable",
        "")
    | where Tactic != "";
_suspect
| summarize Bucket = bin(Timestamp, _window),
            FirstSeen = min(Timestamp), LastSeen = max(Timestamp),
            DistinctTactics = dcount(Tactic),
            Tactics = make_set(Tactic),
            CmdLines = make_set(ProcessCommandLine, 25),
            ParentChain = make_set(InitiatingProcessFileName, 10),
            Users = make_set(AccountName, 5)
        by DeviceId, DeviceName, bin(Timestamp, _window)
| where DistinctTactics >= 3
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let _window = 10m;
let _suspect = SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | where Account !endswith "$"
    | extend Img = tolower(NewProcessName), Cmd = tolower(CommandLine)
    | extend Tactic = case(
        Img endswith "\\vssadmin.exe"  and Cmd has "delete"  and Cmd has "shadows", "vss_delete",
        Img endswith "\\wmic.exe"      and Cmd has "shadowcopy" and Cmd has "delete", "wmic_shadow",
        Img endswith "\\wbadmin.exe"   and Cmd has "delete"  and (Cmd has "catalog" or Cmd has "systemstatebackup" or Cmd has "backup"), "wbadmin_delete",
        Img endswith "\\bcdedit.exe"   and ((Cmd has "recoveryenabled" and Cmd has "no") or (Cmd has "bootstatuspolicy" and Cmd has "ignoreallfailures")), "bcdedit_recovery_off",
        Img endswith "\\wevtutil.exe"  and (Cmd has " cl " or Cmd has "clear-log"), "wevtutil_clear",
        Img endswith "\\net.exe"       and Cmd has "stop"   and (Cmd has "veeam" or Cmd has "backupexec" or Cmd has "mssql" or Cmd has "sqlagent" or Cmd has "vmms" or Cmd has "msexchange"), "svc_stop_backup",
        Img endswith "\\sc.exe"        and Cmd has "config" and Cmd has "disabled", "sc_disable",
        "")
    | where Tactic != "";
_suspect
| summarize FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated),
            DistinctTactics = dcount(Tactic),
            Tactics = make_set(Tactic),
            CmdLines = make_set(CommandLine, 25),
            Parents = make_set(ParentProcessName, 10),
            Users = make_set(Account, 5)
        by Computer, bin(TimeGenerated, _window)
| where DistinctTactics >= 3
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.rationale: Medusa's encryptor (per CISA AA25-071A and Symantec/Mandiant tracking) batches its inhibit-recovery routine inline rather than spreading it across a kill-chain. The combination of >=3 of {vssadmin shadow delete, wbadmin catalog/backup delete, bcdedit recoveryenabled No, wevtutil cl, net/sc stop on backup-or-DB services} fired by one host inside 10 minutes is overwhelmingly diagnostic of a Medusa-c

ucs.title: [LLM] Medusa BYOVD EDR-killer (gaze.exe / KillAV / vulnerable signed driver) drop + service-control
ucs.description: Hunts Medusa's signature 'bring your own vulnerable driver' (BYOVD) defense-evasion step where the affiliate writes a known KillAV utility (gaze.exe / smuol.dll / KillAV variants) plus a vulnerable signed driver (e.g. truesight.sys, aswArPot.sys, kArtos.sys) into a writable path, registers it as a kernel service, and kernel-kills EDR/AV processes immediately before encryption. Public reporting (CISA AA25-071A, SOCRadar, Symantec) ties this exact tooling — gaze.exe + an ABYSSWORKER-style driver — specifically to Medusa's ransomware operators.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Filesystem.file_path) as paths values(Filesystem.file_name) as files from datamodel=Endpoint.Filesystem where Filesystem.file_name IN ("gaze.exe","smuol.dll","truesight.sys","aswArPot.sys","kArtos.sys","rentdrv2.sys","AToolsKrnl64.sys","viragt64.sys","ABYSSWORKER.sys") OR (Filesystem.file_name="*.sys" AND (Filesystem.file_path="*\\Users\\Public\\*" OR Filesystem.file_path="*\\ProgramData\\*" OR Filesystem.file_path="*\\Windows\\Temp\\*" OR Filesystem.file_path="*\\Users\\*\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\*")) by Filesystem.dest Filesystem.user Filesystem.process_name Filesystem.file_name _time span=15m | `drop_dm_object_name(Filesystem)` | join type=inner dest [ | tstats summariesonly=true values(Processes.process) as svcCmd values(Processes.process_name) as svcProc from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.process_name="sc.exe" AND Processes.process="*create*" AND Processes.process="*type=*kernel*") OR (Processes.process_name="sc.exe" AND Processes.process="*start*") OR (Processes.process_name IN ("net.exe","taskkill.exe","sc.exe") AND (Processes.process="*Sense*" OR Processes.process="*WinDefend*" OR Processes.process="*MsMpEng*" OR Processes.process="*MsSense*" OR Processes.process="*CSFalcon*" OR Processes.process="*SentinelAgent*")) by Processes.dest Processes.user _time span=15m | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` ] | convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime)
ucs.kql:
let _window = 15m;
let _killav_names = dynamic(["gaze.exe","smuol.dll","killav.exe","avkill.exe"]);
let _vuln_drivers = dynamic(["truesight.sys","aswarpot.sys","kartos.sys","rentdrv2.sys","atoolskrnl64.sys","viragt64.sys","abyssworker.sys","procexp152.sys"]);
let _killav_drop = DeviceFileEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
    | where ActionType in ("FileCreated","FileRenamed")
    | where (tolower(FileName) in (_killav_names))
         or (tolower(FileName) in (_vuln_drivers))
         or (FileName endswith ".sys" and FolderPath has_any (@"\Users\Public\", @"\ProgramData\", @"\Windows\Temp\", @"\AppData\Local\Temp\"))
    | project DropTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName,
              DroppedFile = FileName, DroppedPath = FolderPath,
              DropProc = InitiatingProcessFileName,
              DropCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
              DropSHA256 = SHA256;
let _service_or_kill = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | where (FileName =~ "sc.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("create","start","config")
                and (ProcessCommandLine has "kernel"
                  or ProcessCommandLine has_any ("Sense","WinDefend","MsMpEng","MsSense","CSFalcon","SentinelAgent","CrowdStrike","CarbonBlack","SophosFS","McAfee")))
         or (FileName in~ ("net.exe","taskkill.exe")
                and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("Sense","WinDefend","MsMpEng","MsSense","CSFalcon","SentinelAgent","CrowdStrike","CarbonBlack","SophosFS","McAfee"))
    | project ActionTime = Timestamp, DeviceId,
              ActionProc = FileName, ActionCmd = ProcessCommandLine,
              ActionUser = AccountName;
_killav_drop
| join kind=inner _service_or_kill on DeviceId
| where ActionTime between (DropTime .. DropTime + _window)
| project DeviceName, DropTime, ActionTime,
          DelaySec = datetime_diff('second', ActionTime, DropTime),
          DroppedFile, DroppedPath, DropSHA256, DropProc, DropCmd,
          ActionProc, ActionCmd, ActionUser
| order by DropTime desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let _window = 15m;
let _killav_names = dynamic(["gaze.exe","smuol.dll","killav.exe","avkill.exe"]);
let _vuln_drivers = dynamic(["truesight.sys","aswarpot.sys","kartos.sys","rentdrv2.sys","atoolskrnl64.sys","viragt64.sys","abyssworker.sys","procexp152.sys"]);
let _drop = ImFileEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
    | where EventType in ("FileCreated","FileRenamed")
    | where (tolower(TargetFileName) in (_killav_names))
         or (tolower(TargetFileName) in (_vuln_drivers))
         or (TargetFileName endswith ".sys" and TargetFilePath has_any (@"\Users\Public\", @"\ProgramData\", @"\Windows\Temp\", @"\AppData\Local\Temp\"))
    | project DropTime = TimeGenerated, Computer = DvcHostname,
              DroppedFile = TargetFileName, DroppedPath = TargetFilePath,
              DropProc = ActingProcessName, DropCmd = ActingProcessCommandLine,
              DropSHA256 = TargetFileSHA256;
let _action = SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | where Account !endswith "$"
    | extend Img = tolower(NewProcessName), Cmd = tolower(CommandLine)
    | where (Img endswith "\\sc.exe"
                and (Cmd has "create" or Cmd has "start" or Cmd has "config")
                and (Cmd has "kernel"
                  or Cmd has_any ("sense","windefend","msmpeng","mssense","csfalcon","sentinelagent","crowdstrike","carbonblack","sophosfs","mcafee")))
         or ((Img endswith "\\net.exe" or Img endswith "\\taskkill.exe")
                and Cmd has_any ("sense","windefend","msmpeng","mssense","csfalcon","sentinelagent","crowdstrike","carbonblack","sophosfs","mcafee"))
    | project ActionTime = TimeGenerated, Computer,
              ActionProc = NewProcessName, ActionCmd = CommandLine, ActionUser = Account;
_drop
| join kind=inner _action on Computer
| where ActionTime between (DropTime .. DropTime + _window)
| project Computer, DropTime, ActionTime,
          DelaySec = datetime_diff('second', ActionTime, DropTime),
          DroppedFile, DroppedPath, DropSHA256, DropProc, DropCmd,
          ActionProc, ActionCmd, ActionUser
| order by DropTime desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: Medusa Ransomware BYOVD KillAV Driver Drop
id: 7e6c8b8a-md5-4a3f-9c2d-medusakillav01
status: experimental
description: Detects Medusa-affiliated drop of known KillAV/BYOVD components (gaze.exe, ABYSSWORKER, truesight.sys etc.) into world-writable paths.
references:
  - https://www.cisa.gov/news-events/cybersecurity-advisories/aa25-071a
  - https://symantec-enterprise-blogs.security.com/threat-intelligence/medusa-ransomware
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/03
tags:
  - attack.defense_evasion
  - attack.t1562.001
  - attack.t1068
  - attack.t1543.003
logsource:
  category: file_event
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_killav_names:
    TargetFilename|endswith:
      - '\gaze.exe'
      - '\smuol.dll'
      - '\killav.exe'
      - '\avkill.exe'
  selection_vuln_drivers:
    TargetFilename|endswith:
      - '\truesight.sys'
      - '\aswArPot.sys'
      - '\kArtos.sys'
      - '\rentdrv2.sys'
      - '\AToolsKrnl64.sys'
      - '\viragt64.sys'
      - '\ABYSSWORKER.sys'
      - '\procexp152.sys'
  selection_temp_driver:
    TargetFilename|endswith: '.sys'
    TargetFilename|contains:
      - '\Users\Public\'
      - '\ProgramData\'
      - '\Windows\Temp\'
      - '\AppData\Local\Temp\'
  condition: selection_killav_names or selection_vuln_drivers or selection_temp_driver
falsepositives:
  - Vendor-supplied driver installers writing to ProgramData (rare; review signer)
level: high
ucs.rationale: Medusa is one of the few crews with publicly attributed BYOVD tooling — CISA's AA25-071A flight names gaze.exe and the ABYSSWORKER driver explicitly, and Elastic/Symantec link the same combo to Medusa affiliates rather than the broader BlackCat/RansomHub ecosystem. The detection chains the *drop* of a known killer or kernel driver into a world-writable path with a *follow-on* `sc create … type= ke
_sigma_issues: sigma parse error: Sigma rule identifier must be an UUID
